questions.prompt: Did you catch the bookstore buyback this morning?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did you catch the bookstore buyback this morning?
questions.answer: Yeah, I sold my textbooks back early.

questions.prompt: When does the campus radio show start?
questions.prompt_task_text: When does the campus radio show start?
questions.answer: I'm not sure when the show starts.

questions.prompt: The telescope night got pushed back an hour.
questions.prompt_task_text: The telescope night got pushed back an hour.
questions.answer: Oh, did the clouds finally clear up tonight?

questions.prompt: Do you know if your pottery class still has open seats?
questions.prompt_task_text: Do you know if your pottery class still has open seats?
questions.answer: Apparently two spots opened up when my friend dropped.

questions.prompt: Did you sign up for the blood drive today?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did you sign up for the blood drive today?
questions.answer: No, the nurses told me sign-ups close at three.

questions.prompt: Where can I find your resume workshop sign-up sheet?
questions.prompt_task_text: Where can I find your resume workshop sign-up sheet?
questions.answer: The sheet that lists the open slots is right by the door.

questions.prompt: The food truck on the quad switched its menu.
questions.prompt_task_text: The food truck on the quad switched its menu.
questions.answer: Do you know if they're still making dumplings?

questions.prompt: Have you tried the new vending machines in the lobby?
questions.prompt_task_text: Have you tried the new vending machines in the lobby?
questions.answer: Not yet, but someone said they are cash-free now.

questions.prompt: Did the art exhibit opening get moved to Friday?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did the art exhibit opening get moved to Friday?
questions.answer: I was wondering when the gallery would announce that.

questions.prompt: What did the coach tell you about the pool hours?
questions.prompt_task_text: What did the coach tell you about the pool hours?
questions.answer: He told me the lanes that were roped off for practice stay blocked.

questions.prompt: Are the theater auditions in the main hall?
questions.prompt_task_text: Are the theater auditions in the main hall?
questions.answer: Yeah, my audition wrapped up at five.

questions.prompt: Did my package arrive at the mail center?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did my package arrive at the mail center?
questions.answer: Yes, your box came in this morning.

questions.prompt: The bike share docks by you are empty.
questions.prompt_task_text: The bike share docks by you are empty.
questions.answer: Sorry, I docked mine by the gym.

questions.prompt: Do you know whether the quiet floor policy starts this week?
questions.prompt_task_text: Do you know whether the quiet floor policy starts this week?
questions.answer: Apparently the rule that bans music kicks in Monday.

questions.prompt: Why did the farmers market move off the quad?
questions.prompt_task_text: Why did the farmers market move off the quad?
questions.answer: The vendors wanted the shade that our courtyard provides.

questions.prompt: The language exchange meets somewhere new tonight.
questions.prompt_task_text: The language exchange meets somewhere new tonight.
questions.answer: Do you know if the room was changed again?

questions.prompt: The a cappella concert starts a bit late.
questions.prompt_task_text: The a cappella concert starts a bit late.
questions.answer: Do you know who's opening for them tonight?

questions.prompt: Have they posted your climbing wall hours yet?
questions.prompt_task_text: Have they posted your climbing wall hours yet?
questions.answer: Not yet, but I'll find out when the desk reopens.

questions.prompt: What did the organizer tell you about the film screening?
questions.prompt_task_text: What did the organizer tell you about the film screening?
questions.answer: She wanted to know whether the room that we booked would be free.
